title: 5 AI Terms Everyone Should Know
description: Learn and retain 5 core AI terms using active recall and spaced repetition.

steps.text: You're about to learn 5 essential AI terms using active recall.
First you'll see each term and practice recalling it right away. Then you'll take a final recall check to see how much you retained.

steps.title: Start
steps.text: Let's begin with the first term.
A model is a system trained to recognize patterns and generate output based on data.

steps.after: is a system trained to recognize patterns and generate output based on data.
steps.retryPrompt: A trained AI system is called a ______.

steps.before: A model is trained to recognize
steps.after: and generate output based on data.
steps.retryPrompt: A model is trained to recognize ______.

steps.question: What is a model?
options: A system trained to recognize patterns and generate output
steps.explanation: A model is a system trained to recognize patterns and generate output based on data.

steps.title: Next Term
steps.text: Now let's learn the next term and then revisit what model means.
A prompt is the input you give to an AI system to guide its response.

steps.before: The input you give to an AI system is called a
steps.retryPrompt: A question or instruction given to AI is called a ______.

steps.before: A prompt is used to guide an AI system's
steps.retryPrompt: A prompt helps guide the AI system's ______.

steps.after: is a system trained to recognize patterns and generate output based on data.
steps.retryPrompt: A trained AI system is called a ______.

steps.question: What does a prompt do?
options: It guides the AI system's response
steps.explanation: A prompt is the input you give to an AI system to guide its response.

steps.title: Next Term
steps.text: Good. Now let's add another term and continue reinforcing what you've already seen.
A token is a small unit of text, such as a word or part of a word, used by AI models.

steps.after: is a small unit of text used by AI models.
steps.retryPrompt: A small unit of text used by AI is called a ______.

steps.before: A token is a small unit of
steps.retryPrompt: A token is a small unit of ______.

steps.before: The input you give to an AI system is called a
steps.retryPrompt: A question or instruction given to AI is called a ______.

steps.question: Which term means a small unit of text used by AI?
steps.explanation: A token is a small unit of text used by AI models.

steps.title: Next Term
steps.text: Now let's add the term most people hear often when they use ChatGPT or Claude.
An LLM, or Large Language Model, is an AI trained on massive amounts of text to generate language.

steps.after: is an AI trained on massive amounts of text to generate language.
steps.retryPrompt: A Large Language Model is often called an ______.

steps.before: An LLM is trained on massive amounts of
steps.retryPrompt: An LLM is trained on massive amounts of ______.

steps.after: is a small unit of text used by AI models.
steps.retryPrompt: A small unit of text used by AI is called a ______.

steps.question: What does LLM stand for?
steps.explanation: LLM stands for Large Language Model.

steps.title: Final Term
steps.text: One more term. Then we'll see how much you retained.
RAG, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation, combines a model with external knowledge sources to improve responses.

steps.after: combines a model with external knowledge sources to improve responses.
steps.retryPrompt: Retrieval-Augmented Generation is often shortened to ______.

steps.before: RAG combines a model with external knowledge
steps.retryPrompt: RAG combines a model with external knowledge ______.

steps.after: is an AI trained on massive amounts of text to generate language.
steps.retryPrompt: A Large Language Model is often called an ______.

steps.question: What does RAG do?
options: It combines a model with external knowledge sources
steps.explanation: RAG combines a model with external knowledge sources to improve responses.

steps.title: Final Recall Check
steps.text: Now we're going to see how much of what you just learned you retained.

steps.question: What is the input you give to an AI system?
steps.explanation: The input you give to an AI system is called a prompt.

steps.after: is a small unit of text used by AI models.
steps.retryPrompt: A small unit of text used by AI is called a ______.

steps.question: Which term refers to an AI trained on massive amounts of text to generate language?
steps.explanation: An LLM is trained on massive amounts of text to generate language.

steps.before: A model is trained to recognize
steps.after: and generate output based on data.
steps.retryPrompt: A model is trained to recognize ______.

steps.question: Which term combines a model with external knowledge sources?
steps.explanation: RAG combines a model with external knowledge sources to improve responses.

steps.before: The input you give to an AI system is called a
steps.retryPrompt: A question or instruction given to AI is called a ______.

steps.question: What is a model?
options: A system trained to recognize patterns and generate output
A way to break text into tokens
A command typed into a browser
steps.explanation: A model is a system trained to recognize patterns and generate output based on data.

steps.title: Complete
steps.text: Nice work. You just used active recall to learn 5 AI terms and then tested what you retained.
Let these terms sit overnight, then come back and take the recall check again.
You may be surprised how much you remember tomorrow compared to what you would have retained from a lecture alone.

steps.title: Lesson Complete
steps.text: You can return to the catalog now, or come back later and retake this lesson for more practice.
